title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules and a leadership framework for successfully building projects with Claude Code, based on Y Combinator principles. The video covers what to avoid building, what to prioritize, and six moves for leading an AI-enabled team, drawn from his experience scaling a $25M+ startup.
